goal_text: Task 09897: You are looking for a restaurant in the east part of town and it should serve singaporean food. If there is no such venue how about chinese type of food. Make sure you get the address, phone number, and postcode of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
